回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 公眾演說(一) (Public Speaking I)	開課班級 : 應英三年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 蘇淑品	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
Objectives: Develop skills and qualities of public speaking by: --Discovering the importance of speech communication in everyday life --Recognizing the importance of the audience in speech preparation --Presenting the steps in planning an effective speech --Examining the importance of the parts of a speech: introduction, transition and conclusion --Exploring different techniques in delivery and their effectiveness --Comparing the use of various types of visual aids and their purpose in a speech  


2.教學綱要
Activities: Reading/studying of the textbook assignment is required for effective class
participation. Class activities will include public speaking, listening, evaluating and constructive critiquing discussions.
 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Getting started in Public Speaking　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : ames Payne & Diana Prentice Carlin,　出版社 : McGraw-Hill Glencoe Publishing　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluations: 100% assigned speeches/presentations and participation in class (attendance, tardiness, class activities and discussions, and active listening and participation, constructive evaluation of class presentations.
